determinism_rule: stress validation must prefer checked-in fixtures deterministic mutations and recorded replay cases over unbounded random input generation
allowed_input_classes: deterministic mutation of checked-in malformed-input fixtures
allowed_execution_modes: signature-based crash triage over captured summaries
required_guards: bounded case count or manifest-selected corpus
machine-owned artifact and report roots only
record stable failure signature before reducer output
no publishable claim without checked-in source traceability
differential_rules: differential comparisons must run the same checked-in source family through explicitly named compiler or workflow paths
provider-consumer and import-export differentials must stay on the live compile wrapper and replay proof surfaces
mixed-module stress validation must preserve emitted module artifacts for replay instead of recomputing hidden state
forbidden_patterns: unbounded random generation with no recorded seed or mutation recipe
writing reducer outputs back into checked-in fixture roots
claiming crash freedom from compile success alone
running generated binaries outside machine-owned temporary roots
milestone-local wrapper scripts that bypass the public compile path
